target_behavior.notes: Start point at the left junction of the manifold
Asymmetric left-side Y-split: Upper-Left and Lower-Left diagonal branches
Central main passage running from left side toward the right side
Asymmetric right-side Y-split: Upper-Right and Lower-Right diagonal branches
All four branch ends are open ports with hollow geometry and visible wall thickness

design_notes: Asymmetric four-port hollow pipe manifold with uniform 20mm outer diameter.
Smooth Y-shaped blended transitions at all junctions; no bulbous or spherical nodes.
Central passage is 80mm long connecting the two Y-junctions.
Left branches extend toward upper-left and lower-left with slight length and angle asymmetry.
Right branches extend toward upper-right and lower-right with slight length and angle asymmetry.
Single continuous tubular system with clean brushed metal finish.
